# Hybrid GLM (Context HMM + Logistic Regression) -- Results

*Auto-generated by `hybrid_glm/fit.py`.*

## Data

- Training trials: 60,538 (113 subjects)
- Test trials: 60,507 (113 subjects)
- Features: 11 (6 boolean + 1 continuous + 4 interactions)

## Context HMM fitted parameters

- `p_switch = 0.018822`
- Expected block length: 53.1 trials (= 1 / p_switch)

### Transition matrix

| | Visual context | Auditory context |
|---|---|---|
| **Visual context** | 0.981178 | 0.018822 |
| **Auditory context** | 0.018822 | 0.981178 |

| vis_non_target | 0.0360 | 0.0380 |
| aud_target | 0.2487 | 0.9842 |
| aud_non_target | 0.0205 | 0.2323 |
